mission.title: keycloak: Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing email
mission.description: Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing email. Requested by 57+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the SMTP OAuth 2.0 requirement
steps.description:
Many email providers (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace) are deprecating basic SMTP authentication in favor of OAuth 2.0. Keycloak's outgoing email (password resets, verification emails, etc.) previously only supported basic SMTP auth, which means it could lose the ability to send email through these providers.

This feature adds OAuth 2.0 token-based SMTP authentication as an alternative to username/password credentials.

steps.title: Configure SMTP OAuth 2.0 in the Admin Console
steps.description:
Navigate to the Keycloak Admin Console and configure the SMTP OAuth 2.0 settings:
1. Go to **Realm Settings > Email**
2. Under **Connection & Authentication**, select the OAuth 2.0 authentication method
3. Provide the OAuth 2.0 token endpoint, client ID, and client secret for your email provider
4. Save the configuration

See the [source PR](https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/36665) for implementation details.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "keycloak: Add support for SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication for outgoing email" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Keycloak added SMTP OAuth 2.0 authentication support, allowing outgoing emails (password resets, verification emails) to authenticate via OAuth 2.0 tokens instead of basic username/password credentials. This ensures compatibility with providers like Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace that are deprecating basic SMTP auth.

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
